items.headline: Why Boston Bruins are eliminated from 2025-2026 postseason
items.description:
The Boston Bruins were eliminated from the Stanley Cup Playoffs with a 4-1 loss to the Buffalo Sabres in Game 6 of the Eastern Conference First Round at TD Garden in Boston on Friday.
The Bruins (45-27-10) were the first wild card in the East and qualified for the playoffs

items.headline: Fantasy hockey picks props projections for 2025-26 season
items.description: NHL.com identifies players to watch for free-to-play fantasy hockey games, props and futures throughout the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs. For more coverage, visit NHL.com/Fantasy.

items.headline: Utah Mammoth believe in future despite early playoff exit
items.description: SALT LAKE CITY -- The easy thing would have been to focus on the pride. Instead, Utah Mammoth coach Andre Tourigny focused on the pain.

items.headline: 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs first round schedule television results
items.description: The 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs are underway. Here is the complete schedule for the first round of the playoffs, including TV information and results:

items.headline: Buffalo Sabres celebrate first playoff series win since 2007
items.description: BOSTON -- The days had dragged on, the minutes, the hours, the disappointment simmering, the anticipation building. The Buffalo Sabres had held within their grasp a chance to clinch the first Stanley Cup Playoffs series win in 19 years on home ice in Game 5, had taken the Boston Bruins

items.headline: Tampa Bay Lightning, Montreal Canadiens deliver ‘epic’ Game 6 to remember
items.description:
MONTREAL — It was, as they say in these parts, un classique.
You don’t have to know French to understand what that means.
And you didn’t have to be rooting for either the Tampa Bay Lightning or the Montreal Canadiens Friday to truly appreciate the theatre you were watching in

items.headline: Anaheim Ducks Vegas Golden Knights 2026 playoff lookahead
items.description:
The Anaheim Ducks will play the Vegas Golden Knights in the Western Conference Second Round of the Stanley Cup Playoffs.
The Ducks advanced to the second round for the first time since 2017 by defeating the Edmonton Oilers 5-2 in Game 6 of the first round at Honda Center in

items.headline: Start times for Stanley Cup Playoff games on May 3 announced
items.description:
NEW YORK -- The National Hockey League today announced the starting times and national broadcast information for Sunday’s 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs, including the First Round Game 7 between Montreal and Tampa Bay, and the Second Round Game 1 between Minnesota and Colorado.
Sunday, May 3

items.headline: Vegas Golden Knights Utah Mammoth Game 6 recap May 1, 2026
items.description: SALT LAKE CITY -- Mitch Marner had two goals and an assist for the Vegas Golden Knights, who eliminated the Utah Mammoth with a 5-1 win in Game 6 of the Western Conference First Round at Delta Center on Friday.

items.headline: Buffalo Sabres Boston Bruins game 6 recap May 1 2026
items.description: BOSTON -- The Buffalo Sabres won a Stanley Cup Playoff series for the first time since 2007, defeating the Boston Bruins 4-1 in Game 6 of the Eastern Conference First Round at TD Garden on Friday.

items.headline: Tampa Bay Lightning Montreal Canadiens game 6 recap May 1 2026
items.description: MONTREAL -- Gage Goncalves scored at 9:03 of overtime for the Tampa Bay Lightning, who avoided elimination with a 1-0 win against the Montreal Canadiens in Game 6 of the Eastern Conference First Round at Bell Centre on Friday.

items.headline: Joel Eriksson Ek quietly making impact for Minnesota in 2026 playoffs
items.description:
ST. PAUL, Minn. -- Inside the Minnesota Wild dressing room, the players know about Joel Eriksson Ek and his impact on the team. The center's current and previous coaches know, too. So do the media covering him every day.
"He's just special," Wild forward Matt Boldy said. "You don't find

items.headline: Buffalo Sabres Tampa Bay Lightning Montreal Canadiens 2026 playoff lookahead
items.description:
The Buffalo Sabres will play the Montreal Canadiens or Tampa Bay Lightning in the Eastern Conference Second Round of the Stanley Cup Playoffs.
The Sabres won their first playoff series since 2006-07 with a 4-1 victory against the Boston Bruins in Game 6 of the first round at TD Garden

items.headline: Tampa Bay Lightning, Montreal Canadiens Game 7 lookahead
items.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning and Montreal Canadiens will play Game 7 of the Eastern Conference First Round at Benchmark International Arena on Sunday (6 p.m. ET; The Spot, HBO MAX, truTV, TNT, SN, TVAS, CBC).

items.headline: Logan Stankoven flourishing in playoffs again for Hurricanes
items.description:
Logan Stankoven wore out a path to the podium in the first round of the Stanley Cup Playoffs.
